description: Specialising in fashionable style, and crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. This bag with its textured leatherette upper and elegant silver hardware adds a stylish spin to your off-duty ensembles. Carry this while wearing understated outfits and a tonal belt. Textured leatherette upper with a metallic brand badge on the front and contrast stitch detailing Two handles Three main zippered compartments with a zippered pocket on the third compartment and two mobile pouches in the first Zippered pocket on the back Two zippered pockets in the sides Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
